title: Vertix migration
subtitle: Independent system — import categories then news from the Vertix database (incremental, idempotent)
disconnected: Could not connect to the Vertix database
phase2Locked: Finish importing categories first to enable this phase
newsHint: Imports only the newest news (by original Vertix ID) — no duplicates, safe to re-run.
workerHint: Runs on the vertix queue. If the counter does not advance, start the worker: php artisan queue:work --queue=vertix — or run directly: php artisan vertix:import-news
